text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... Well, that was quite the lengthy afternoon nap...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: The path back to the dorm should be...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, greetings, Goddess Statue. Fancy seeing you
again so soon.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
After all, we just spoke in the world of dreams,
didn't we? I imagine we were meant to cross
paths.
